reviews.author: Rohan P.
reviews.text: Sent my PDF on WhatsApp and the color printouts were ready in 10 minutes. Quality is excellent and the rates are very reasonable. Best xerox shop in Virar West.

reviews.author: Sneha K.
reviews.text: Got my project spiral binding done here. Neat work, friendly staff and super fast service. Highly recommended for students.

reviews.author: Amit D.
reviews.text: Jumbo xerox for my business documents at a great price. They handle bulk orders without any fuss. Very professional.

reviews.author: Priya M.
reviews.text: Needed urgent passport photos and printouts. Done instantly with a smile. Clean shop and helpful owner.

reviews.author: Vikram S.
reviews.text: Reliable for all stationery and printing needs. Good location near Viva College. Slight wait during peak hours but worth it.

reviews.author: Neha J.
reviews.text: Sent files from home on WhatsApp and collected later. So convenient! Lamination and binding also available. Great service.
